mira_chen_first.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_first.text: New face. You fly that Arrow in the docking bay? Good. I need someone the Militia doesn't know yet.

mira_chen_job.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_job.text: Nothing dangerous. Yet. I need a data chip picked up from Nav Point Echo. Standard courier run. Pays well.

mira_chen_chip.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_chip.text: Financial records. Boring stuff, unless you're the person whose name is on them. Pick it up and don't read it.

mira_chen_accept.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_accept.text: Smart. Nav Point Echo — you'll see it on your map. And pilot? Watch for Hawks on the way back.

mira_chen_who.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_who.text: Someone who's been in this system long enough to know where the bodies are buried. Figuratively. Mostly.

mira_chen_dismiss.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_dismiss.text: Your loss. Come back when you change your mind.

mira_chen_conspiracy.speaker: mira_chen
mira_chen_conspiracy.text: You read it, didn't you. Those records show Reyes taking a 20% cut of every pirate raid in this system. He's been running both sides.

choices.label: What do we do with this?

mira_conspiracy_options.speaker: mira_chen
mira_conspiracy_options.text: Three options. Burn him publicly — the traders will love you, the Militia won't. Sell the evidence back to Reyes — he'll pay. Or... broker a deal and make everyone uncomfortable. Your call.

commander_reyes_first.speaker: commander_reyes
commander_reyes_first.text: Pilot. Fort Kepler has work for reliable contractors. Interested in a bounty contract?

reyes_bounty.speaker: commander_reyes
reyes_bounty.text: Razor-class pirate working the Kepler Belt. Disrupting supply lanes. 800 credits on proof of kill.

reyes_bounty_accept.speaker: commander_reyes
reyes_bounty_accept.text: Good. Kepler Belt is north of your current position. Don't let it get away.

reyes_dismiss.speaker: commander_reyes
reyes_dismiss.text: Come back when you're ready to work.

marcus_vane_first.speaker: marcus_vane
marcus_vane_first.text: You smell like a trader. Blackrock doesn't get many traders. Sit down. What do you need?

choices.label: I heard you might have work.

marcus_browse.speaker: marcus_vane
marcus_browse.text: Market's open. Best prices on fuel in the system. Don't ask where it came from.

marcus_work.speaker: marcus_vane
marcus_work.text: Depends on what kind of work you mean. Come back with a better reputation and we'll talk.
